name: Dodge
effect: Once per game, re-roll one failed Armour Save.

name: Nerves of Steel
effect: Immune to the Suppressed result on the first wound.

name: Ambidextrous
effect: May shoot two sidearms in one Shoot action (resolve both, −1 To-Hit on each).

name: Fortune
effect: Once per game, re-roll any single dice roll before the result is applied.

name: Quick Fire
effect: May Shoot as a free action after a Move action once per activation.

name: Aggressive
effect: +1 to Melee rolls; may re-roll a losing Melee result once per game.

name: Initiative
effect: Always activates first in the round when initiative is tied.

name: Artillerist
effect: May use support weapons without the −2 point-blank penalty.

name: Marksman
effect: Ignores cover penalties at Band 4 and Band 5.

name: Sharpshooter
effect: Aimed shot gives +3 To-Hit instead of +2.

name: Martial Arts
effect: Unarmed Melee bonus is +2 instead of −1; may roll Melee twice per combat and use the higher result.
